title: Revert to Image-Based Questions and Options with Responsive Image Display

requirements.summary: Update Admin Panel 'Add Question' modal to use image URL input fields with live preview thumbnails
acceptanceCriteria: Modal has a question image URL input with a live preview thumbnail
Modal has four option image URL inputs each with a live preview thumbnail
Radio buttons allow selecting the correct option (1–4)
Submitting calls addQuestion with image URL values
Modal closes on success and shows a success toast
Question gallery refreshes to show the new question

file_operations.description: Replace the existing text input fields with image URL input fields. Add a text input for questionImageUrl and four text inputs labeled 'Option 1 Image URL' through 'Option 4 Image URL'. Below each URL input, render a live preview thumbnail using an element with max-h-32, w-auto, object-contain classes to show a small preview of the image. Keep the radio button selector for the correct option (1-4). Update the form submission to call addQuestion(questionImageUrl, optionImageUrls, correctOption) with the image URL values. Ensure the modal closes on success and shows a success toast.

requirements.summary: Update Admin Panel Question Gallery to display questions and options as responsive images with correct answer highlighting
acceptanceCriteria: Each question card shows the question image with object-contain and a defined max height
Four option images are shown in a 2×2 grid per card
Correct answer option image is highlighted with a green border
Image containers are responsive and do not overflow on mobile or desktop
Images are clearly visible at all screen sizes

file_operations.description: Replace text-based question rendering with image-based rendering. For each question card, display question.questionImageUrl in a responsive container with w-full, object-contain, and max-h-48 classes. Below the question image, render the four option images (question.optionImageUrls) in a 2×2 grid using a grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 layout. Each option image should use object-contain and max-h-24 classes. Highlight the correct answer option image (based on question.correctOption index) with a green border (e.g., border-4 border-green-500). Ensure all image containers are responsive and do not overflow on mobile or desktop.

requirements.summary: Update QuestionDisplay component to render question and answer options as responsive images with selectable cards
acceptanceCriteria: Question image renders with object-contain in a responsive container
Question image max height is defined and adjustable, ensuring full visibility
Four option images render as selectable cards in a 2-column grid on tablet/desktop and 1-column on mobile
Option image containers use object-contain with defined max height
Selected option card shows a navy border highlight
No image overflow or clipping on any screen size

file_operations.description: Replace text-based question and option rendering with image-based rendering. Display question.questionImageUrl in a responsive container with w-full, object-contain, and responsive max height classes (e.g., max-h-64 on mobile via default, max-h-80 on desktop via md:max-h-80). Render the four option images (question.optionImageUrls) as selectable cards in a grid that is single-column on mobile and 2-column on tablet/desktop (grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4). Each option card should contain an element with object-contain and max-h-40 classes. Highlight the selected option card with a navy border (e.g., border-4 border-navy-600 or using the existing navy color from Tailwind config). Ensure no image overflow or clipping at any screen size.

requirements.summary: Update Test Page answer review section to render question and option images with user/correct answer highlighting
acceptanceCriteria: Answer review shows question images with object-contain in responsive containers
Option images are shown as cards in a 2-column grid on desktop, 1-column on mobile
User's selected answer is highlighted with a blue border
Correct answer is highlighted with a green border
Images do not overflow or get clipped at any screen size

file_operations.description: Update the answer review section (rendered after test submission) to display image-based questions and options. For each reviewed question, render question.questionImageUrl in a responsive container with object-contain and max-h-64 classes. Display all four option images (question.optionImageUrls) as styled cards in a grid that is 2-column on desktop and 1-column on mobile (grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4). Each option image card should use object-contain and max-h-40 classes. Highlight the user's selected answer card with a blue border (e.g., border-4 border-blue-500) and the correct answer card with a green border (e.g., border-4 border-green-500). If the user's answer matches the correct answer, apply only the green border. Ensure images do not overflow or get clipped at any screen size.
